channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Manhattan TV Unveils New 4K Freesat Recorder
item.description: The S4-R can access more than 100 Freesat channels and record up to four channels at once.

item.title: What To Expect For Microsoft Stock's 2026 Outlook, According To Experts
item.description: Analysis of Microsoft's growth trends and price targets for fiscal 2026.

item.title: After the Trump shooting attempt, CEOs need a new security playbook
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: This Tesla Veteran Is Running A Copper Mine With AI-Powered Robots
item.description: Autonomous copper mine in Utah uses AI-powered robots to meet surging demand.
